content.cn_text: 你会听到教育官员在博物馆给即将在博物馆开始为期一周的实习工作的学生讲课。
content.en_text: You will hear the Education Officer in a museum giving a talk to school students who are about to start a one-week work placement in the museum.

content.cn_text: 早上好，欢迎大家。
content.en_text: Good morning and welcome.

content.cn_text: 我们很高兴你下周能来参加我们的实习工作。
content.en_text: We're really pleased that you're going to be joining us next week for your work placement.

content.cn_text: 现在，你们每个人都已经见过负责监督你们的博物馆工作人员了。
content.en_text: Now, each of you will already have met the member of museum staff assigned to supervise you.

content.cn_text: 在今天这个简短的演讲中，我将向你们提供更多与你们六个人相关的一般信息。
content.en_text: In this short talk today I'll be giving you more general information which will be relevant to all six of you.

content.cn_text: 你的正常工作时间是下午9点到5点，但周一是你第一天上班，所以我们希望你在差一刻到。
content.en_text: Your normal working day is nine to five p.m. but on Monday, because it's your first day, we'd like you to arrive at quarter to nine.

content.cn_text: 不过请注意，你会在平常的时间完成。
content.en_text: Please note, though, that you'll finish at the usual time.

content.cn_text: 很多人都在问上班应该穿什么。
content.en_text: A lot of you have been asking what you should wear for work.

content.cn_text: 嗯，你可能已经注意到，我们并不是一个正式的机构，所以如果你穿西装这样时髦的衣服会很不合适。
content.en_text: Well, you may have noticed that we're not exactly a formal institution so you'd really be out of place if you wear smart attire like a suit.

content.cn_text: 如果你和我们一起出去旅行，我们希望你戴一顶博物馆帽……上面有我们的标志，我们觉得这样可以帮助人们认出你。
content.en_text: If you go out on a trip with us, then we'd like you to wear a museum cap ...it has our logo on and we feel it helps people recognise you.

content.cn_text: 但是，在博物馆的日常工作中，我们建议你穿上自己的休闲服，因为你会做很多尘土飞扬、脏乱不堪的工作!
content.en_text: But, on a day-to-day basis in the museum itself we say put on your own casual clothing because you'll be doing lots of dusty, messy work!

content.cn_text: 现在，我们没有太多的规定，但工作实习是为现实工作世界做准备的绝佳机会，我们希望你非常准时和可靠。如果你身体不舒服或者耽误了时间，我们要求你给博物馆接待员打电话……他会在博物馆开馆前很久就到，他会通知你在博物馆的私人主管。
content.en_text: Now, we don't have an enormous number of rules but work placement is an excellent preparation for the real world of work and we expect you to be very punctual and reliable.If you're not well or there's been a hold-up then what we ask you to do is ring the museum receptionist ... he will be in the museum well ahead of opening time and he'll inform your own personal supervisor in the museum.

content.cn_text: 如果你离开超过一天，我们会通知你的学校导师。
content.en_text: If you're away for more than one day, we'll inform your school tutor .

content.cn_text: 他们显然需要记下你的缺席，并在必要时跟进。
content.en_text: they'll obviously need to make a note of your absence and follow up if necessary.

content.cn_text: 但最重要的是，我们希望你们在实习期间玩得开心。
content.en_text: But most of all we hope you really enjoy yourselves during the placement.

content.cn_text: 学生们说他们有很多乐趣，无论是在每周一举行的艺术研讨会上与孩子们一起工作，还是最受欢迎的，当他们外出到寄宿家庭工作时，为我们的口述历史项目记录老年人的学生时代记忆。
content.en_text: Students say they have a lot of fun, whether it's working with kids in our art workshops held every Monday or, the most popular, when they go out on our out-reach work to residential homes, recording elderly people's memories of school days for our oral history project.

content.cn_text: 所以我们希望你对下周开始的工作感到兴奋，并做好准备。你的私人主管会帮助你满足我们的健康和安全要求
content.en_text: So we hope you feel excited by the prospect of starting next week and well prepared.Your personal supervisor will be there to help you with our health and safety requirements

content.cn_text: 当你们下周开始上课时，你们的导师也会向你们简要介绍博物馆的背景，总结我们网站上所有的大量信息。
content.en_text: when you start next week and your supervisors will also brief you about the background to the museum, summarising all the huge amount of information on our website.

content.cn_text: 在接下来的几天里，如果你们能拿到之前和我们一起工作过的学生的评估和其他笔记，你们可以从他们那里得到很多建议，这是值得的。
content.en_text: In the next couple of days it might be worthwhile if you get hold of evaluations and other notes made by students who've worked with us before you can get a lot of pointers from them.

content.cn_text: 在我今天结束之前，我想帮你在博物馆里找路。
content.en_text: Now before I finish today, I wanted to help you find your way around the museum.

content.cn_text: 当你下周一开始工作时，你要做的第一件事就是签到。
content.en_text: When you start next Monday, the first thing you'll need to do is sign in.

content.cn_text: 从正门进来，你就会看到正前方的主楼梯。
content.en_text: Come through the main entrance and you'll see the main staircase straight ahead.

content.cn_text: 右边是马的雕像，后面是一扇门，穿过那扇门，那就是签到处。
content.en_text: To the right of this is the statue of the horse and just behind that is a door - go through that and that's the sign-in office.

content.cn_text: 现在，第一天你将在1号画廊工作。
content.en_text: Now, on the first day you'll be working in Gallery 1.

content.cn_text: 你会发现如下…在靠近入口的中央庭院区域，有一个大箱子，游客可以在那里为博物馆捐款。
content.en_text: You find this as follows ... in the central courtyard area, close to the entrance, there's a large chest where visitors put donations for the museum.

content.cn_text: 那扇门后面就是一号画廊。
content.en_text: The door just behind that leads to Gallery 1.

content.cn_text: 你要参加的研讨会11点开始，但如果你想早点进去，你可以拿钥匙自己进去。
content.en_text: The workshop you'll be taking part in starts at eleven o'clock but if you want to go in earlier you can get the key and let yourself in.

content.cn_text: 这个钥匙盒很难找到。
content.en_text: The key box is quite hard to find.

content.cn_text: 走在前台后面，它在大画廊和书店之间。
content.en_text: Walk behind Reception and it's between the large gallery and the bookshop.

content.cn_text: 我没有提到休息、午餐等。
content.en_text: I haven't mentioned breaks, lunch etc.

content.cn_text: 不幸的是，我们的咖啡馆现在关门了，所以你最好带盒装午餐。
content.en_text: Unfortunately our cafe's closed at the moment so your best bet is to bring a packed lunch.

content.cn_text: 我们倾向于把三明治放在厨房区。绕过接待台，你会看到一个小的圆形橱柜——厨房的门就在它后面。
content.en_text: We tend to have our sandwiches in the kitchen area ... go round the reception desk and you'll see a small circular cabinet - the door to the kitchen area is just behind that.

content.cn_text: 现在，我们每天都张贴告示，告诉大家博物馆里发生了什么。
content.en_text: Now everyday, we put up notices about what's happening in the museum.

content.cn_text: 你的主管会向你简要说明，但如果你想了解细节，可以查看我们的员工布告栏。
content.en_text: Your supervisor will brief you but if you want to check up on details, look on our staff noticeboard.

content.cn_text: 这是在游戏区的角落-在后面，在画廊3的墙上。
content.en_text: This is in the corner of the play area - at the back, on the wall of Gallery 3.

content.cn_text: 如果你有任何问题，我很乐意…
content.en_text: If you have any questions, I'd be happy to ...

groups.desc:
Questions 11-15
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: On Monday, what will be the students' working day?
items.analysis: 正确答案是B选项（8.45 a.m. - 5.00 p.m.）。原文中明确指出，周一这天（第一天）要求学生"arrive at quarter to nine"（8:45到达）。虽然开始时间变了，但结束时间保持不变："you'll finish at the usual time"。之前提到正常工作日是"nine to five p.m."，所以结束时间仍是5:00 p.m.。这道题要求学生能够准确理解时间表达，并将不同信息片段组合起来得出正确结论。

items.title: While working in the museum, students are encouraged to wear

options.title: A
options.content: formal clothing such as a suit.

options.title: B
options.content: a cap with the museum logo.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出，在博物馆日常工作时（"on a day-to-day basis in the museum itself"），学生应该穿自己的休闲服装（"put on your own casual clothing"）。这是因为他们将进行许多尘土飞扬、脏乱的工作。这直接对应了选项C "their own casual clothes"，因此C是正确答案。

items.title: If students are ill or going to be late, they must inform
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，如果学生生病或迟到，他们应该联系博物馆接待员。接待员会在博物馆开放前就到达，并会通知学生的直属主管。这个指示清楚地表明，在这种情况下，学生的第一个联系人应该是博物馆接待员，而不是他们的主管或学校导师。

items.title: The most popular task whilst on work placement is usually

options.title: A
options.content: making presentations in local primary schools.

options.title: B
options.content: talking to elderly people in care homes.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出"the most popular"（最受欢迎的）任务是去养老院记录老年人的回忆。这直接对应了选项B "talking to elderly people in care homes"。原文中的"residential homes"与选项中的"care homes"同义，"recording elderly people's memories"也与"talking to elderly people"相对应。因此，B选项是最符合原文描述的最受欢迎任务。

items.title: The best form of preparation before starting their work placement is to read

options.title: A
options.content: the history of the museum on the website.

options.title: B
options.content: the museum regulations and safety guidance.

options.title: C
options.content: notes made by previous work placement students.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出在工作实习开始前的几天里，获取前人的评估和笔记是很有价值的。这直接对应了题目中询问的"最佳准备形式"。而且，原文中提到这些笔记可以提供很多有用的提示，进一步强调了这种准备方式的重要性和有效性。因此，阅读前人的笔记是最佳的准备方式。

groups.desc:
Questions 16-20
Label the plan below.
Write the correct letter, A-I, next to questions 16-20

items.title: Sign-in office
items.analysis: 因为听力原文中明确提到“Gallery 1”在“central courtyard area, close to the entrance, there's a large chest where visitors put donations for the museum. The door just behind that leads to Gallery 1.”，所以可以确定“Gallery 1”就在捐款箱后面的门，而图中C位置正好符合这个描述。

items.title: Gallery
items.analysis: 文中提到“Gallery 1”时，描述了其位置：“The door just behind that leads to Gallery 1.” 这里的“that”指的是“donations”，即捐款箱。根据图示，捐款箱在中央庭院区域（Central courtyard area）靠近入口的位置，而在捐款箱后面的门通向“Gallery 1”。根据图示，捐款箱后面的门对应的选项是“I”。因此，第17题的正确答案是“I”。

items.title: Key box
items.analysis: 由于原文中提到“钥匙箱在接待处后面，并且位于大画廊和书店之间”，根据图示，大画廊（Gallery 2）和书店（Book Shop）的位置确定，钥匙箱的位置应在H处。因此，答案是H。

items.title: Kitchen area
items.analysis: 因为听力中明确提到“key box”在“Reception”后面，且在“large gallery”和“bookshop”之间，而D位置正好符合这个描述，所以答案是D。

items.title: Staff noticeboard
items.analysis: 文中明确提到员工布告板（staff noticeboard）在游戏区（play area）的角落，靠近Gallery 3的后墙。这符合G的位置描述。
